info.name: ERPNext HRMS API
info.description: Postman Collection to test all GET, GET Each, POST, PUT, and DELETE endpoints for the ERPNext HRMS / Payroll modules.

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Endpoints relating to user session setup.

request.description: Logs in the administrator user and saves cookies to Postman's cookie jar for authenticating subsequent requests.

item.name: Additional Salary
item.description: Endpoints for the Additional Salary DocType (Payroll module).

request.description: Retrieve a list of Additional Salary records.
Create a new record for Additional Salary with validated fields.
Retrieve detailed fields of a specific Additional Salary record.
Update fields of a specific Additional Salary record.
Delete a specific Additional Salary record.
